# PostClaw

> PostClaw is an AI social media manager for small businesses. It learns your brand, suggests what to post, and publishes to Instagram, Facebook, and 7 more platforms.

## What PostClaw Does

PostClaw is your AI social media manager. It suggests post ideas based on your business, writes the content in your voice, adapts it for each platform, and publishes on schedule. It learns your brand voice over time, analyzes performance, and suggests improvements. Your data and social accounts are completely isolated and private.

## Key Features

- AI social media manager that suggests, writes, and publishes content for you
- Publish to 9 social platforms (Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, TikTok, X/Twitter, YouTube, Pinterest, Threads, Bluesky)
- AI-adapted content per platform (tone, length, hashtags, format)
- Content calendar planning and scheduling
- Performance analytics and best time to post recommendations
- Image generation for posts
- Media support (images and videos via Cloudinary)
- Brand voice learning that gets better the more you use it
- Unlimited posts, cancel anytime

## How It Works

1. Sign up and connect your social media accounts (free)
2. Try your first post for free
3. Choose a plan (from $17/month) for unlimited access
4. Your AI social media manager suggests posts, you approve, and it publishes across all your platforms

## Target Audience

- Photographers, creatives, and freelancers who need a consistent social media presence
- Restaurants, cafes, and caterers who want to fill tables through social media
- Coaches, consultants, and service providers building an audience
- Local and small businesses too busy serving customers to manage social media

## Pricing

- Starter: $17/month — 2 social accounts
- Pro: $37/month — 6 social accounts, 3-day free trial
- Business: $79/month — all 9 social accounts, 3-day free trial, priority support
- Annual billing available (30% off)
- Unlimited posts on all plans
- 7-day money-back guarantee
- Cancel anytime, no contracts

## Tech Stack

- AI: Proprietary AI engine
- Social Media API: Zernio (zernio.com)
- Hosting: Vercel (Next.js)

- [Homepage](https://www.postclaw.io): Main landing page with product overview, demo, and pricing
